_publications._publicationTitle: SVA retrotransposon insertion-associated deletion represents a novel mutational mechanism underlying large genomic copy number changes with non-recurrent breakpoints.

_contextSnippet: Custom-designed multiplex ligation-dependent probe amplification (MLPA) and targeted array comparative genomic hybridization (array CGH) were performed to identify the breakpoint regions of the 17 atypical NF1 deletions spanning between 519 kb and 5.9 Mb
details: Successfully identified breakpoint regions of 17 atypical NF1 deletions spanning between 519 kb and 5.9 Mb
